examples: The temblor killed at least 34, 073 and injured another 245, 109.
The temblor twisted roads and bridges, while shutting several copper mines and refineries, at least temporarily.
And so the 8.8-magnitude temblor that shook the capital region overnight was not a surprise, historically speaking.
The last major temblor, a magnitude 7.6 also centered in Nantou County, struck in 1999.
That temblor killed more than 5, 000 people and triggered fears of an eruption from a nearby volcano.
